articles.title: Our Mission: Strategic Vision 2026 - 2030
articles.description: Learn about the core objectives of The Sustainable Humanity Foundation in our effort to save the earth and support vulnerable communities.
articles.body:
## Strategic Vision 2026 - 2030

The Sustainable Humanity Foundation (SHF) was founded with a single goal: to build a future where humanity and nature thrive together. Facing the severe challenges of climate change, SHF is committed to providing outstanding scientific and technological solutions.

### 1. Comprehensive Green Solutions

From 2026 to 2030, SHF will focus on three main pillars:

*   **Environment:** Combating industrial pollution using biodegradation technologies.
*   **Energy:** Providing clean, affordable energy to remote and isolated areas.
*   **Livelihoods:** Supporting circular economy models to help farmers secure long-term stable incomes.

### 2. Global Collaboration

SHF is proud to be a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization in the United States, independently audited according to the strictest standards of USAID/GEF. We connect with partners like RIDES and UNEP to ensure every donated dollar is transformed into practical value.

Join us in building a cleaner, greener world!

articles.title: Technological Breakthrough: Complete Industrial Waste Oil Treatment
articles.description: The RIDES Research Institute and SHF apply microbiological technology to treat thousands of tons of industrial waste oil dumped into the environment.
articles.body:
## The Waste Oil Crisis

Every day, thousands of tons of industrial waste oil are dumped into rivers, causing severe pollution to groundwater sources. This is one of the leading causes of ecosystem destruction.

### SHF's Solution

Together with the RIDES Research Institute in Vietnam, SHF has deployed proprietary microbiological technology to degrade toxic hydrocarbon radicals in waste oil, converting them into organic compounds that are safe for the soil.

**Achieved Efficiency:**
*   Complete treatment of 99% of toxic waste oil.
*   80% cost reduction compared to traditional incineration methods.
*   Zero greenhouse gas emissions.

This technology is currently being piloted in 5 major industrial zones and is preparing for nationwide expansion.

articles.title: Community Responsibility: Changing the Lives of the Vulnerable
articles.description: Thousands of farming households have escaped poverty thanks to the circular agriculture model funded by the SHF Foundation.
articles.body:
## More Than a Charity Fund

SHF believes that the best way to help the poor is not by giving them fish, but by giving them a fishing rod and showing them how to fish.

### Circular Agriculture Model

In poor rural areas, SHF has provided 100% funding to build Circular Agriculture Cooperatives (Aquaponics).
*   Integrated vegetable and fish farming systems without chemical fertilizers.
*   Water sources are continuously reused.
*   Productivity is 3 times higher than traditional farming.

To date, over 500 households in the Mekong Delta and South Central Coast have benefited, securing stable incomes and sustainably escaping poverty.

articles.title: Green Energy: Lighting Up Remote Villages
articles.description: Installing hundreds of rooftop solar power systems in areas without a national power grid.
articles.body:
## Bringing Light to Remote Areas

Many remote areas today still have to live in conditions without electricity, directly affecting children's education and local economic development.

### 'Sun of the Village' Project

SHF initiated the 'Sun of the Village' campaign, calling for donations from the international community to install free mini solar power stations.

*   **Phase 1:** Successfully installed 200 solar panels at highland schools.
*   **Phase 2 (Ongoing):** Expanding to commune health stations, providing a stable power source to preserve vaccines and medicines.

Your contribution, no matter how small, can light up an entire future!

articles.title: Financial Transparency: SHF's Commitment to Donors
articles.description: At SHF, 100% of your donations are independently audited and transparently disclosed.
articles.body:
## Trust is the Foundation

We understand that every dollar you contribute to SHF represents immense trust. Therefore, financial transparency is always the guiding principle in all the foundation's activities.

### Legal Certification

*   **Legal Entity:** SHF is a licensed Non-Profit organization operating under section 501(c)(3) in the United States. Individual or corporate donors in the US are tax-deductible when contributing.
*   **Independent Audit:** All of SHF's annual financial reports are audited by reputable global organizations according to the standards of USAID and the Global Environment Facility (GEF).

### Clear Disbursement Reports

All invoices for equipment purchases, operating costs, and project disbursements are regularly updated on the website. We proudly commit that **over 92% of the budget** goes directly to field activities, while the administrative operation costs are optimized to the lowest possible level.
